overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character running through a residential urban neighborhood at night. The character navigates sidewalks lined with Victorian-style houses, street trees, and parked vehicles while passing various pedestrians. The warm artificial lighting from street lamps creates a distinctive orange glow against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with tram tracks and sidewalk

events.description: character moves from street with tram tracks onto the sidewalk
character accelerates to running speed while passing pedestrian

agents.ego_description: running along the sidewalk past trash bins and pedestrians in a residential neighborhood

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: two-story wooden Victorian houses with bay windows and decorative trim
metal tram tracks embedded in the asphalt street
wooden utility pole with transformer and overhead wires
large gray wheeled trash bins lined up on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character begins crossing tram tracks on a residential street at night, then moves onto the sidewalk lined with Victorian houses. Street lamps cast long shadows as the character runs past trash bins and encounters a pedestrian in a green shirt walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with parked vehicles approaching corner

events.description: character passes close to a parked white van, temporarily blocking the view of the street
character begins turning right to round the street corner

agents.ego_description: running past parked vehicles including a ctOS van while approaching a street corner

notable_agents.action: white ctOS van parked at the curb with company logo visible on side
woman in white shirt walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: decorative black wrought iron fence in front of house entrance

segments.scene_description: The character continues running along the sidewalk, passing a woman in a white shirt and a distinctive white ctOS van parked at the curb. The camera approaches a street corner where wrought iron fences line the properties, and the character begins to turn right onto a darker residential street.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined residential street with increased pedestrian activity

events.description: character rounds the corner onto a darker street with denser tree canopy overhead
encountering a group of three pedestrians walking together on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: running through a group of pedestrians after rounding the corner onto a new street

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking together, temporarily blocking the sidewalk

entered.detail: mature deciduous trees with dense canopy lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: After rounding the corner, the character enters a darker residential street with mature trees lining the sidewalk. The lighting becomes dimmer under the tree canopy as the character runs through a group of three pedestrians walking together, continuing past parked cars and wrought iron fences.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a residential neighborhood at night, transitioning from a brightly lit main street into a dimmer, tree-lined side road. It begins with the character crossing tram tracks and moving onto a sidewalk lined with Victorian houses, where street lamps cast long shadows past trash bins and a pedestrian in a green shirt. As the character continues forward, the camera passes a woman in a white shirt and a parked white ctOS van before approaching a corner marked by wrought iron fences. The scene then shifts as the character turns right, entering a darker residential street where the lighting dims beneath a canopy of mature trees. Finally, the camera glides through a group of three pedestrians and past parked cars, maintaining a steady pace along the fenced properties.
